requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant controls — ODSHACR and HFC restrictions

summary.en: Canada controls ozone-depleting substances and HFCs under the Ozone-depleting Substances and Halocarbon Alternatives Regulations. The mandatory obligation is the regulation, including restrictions on importing substances and products containing controlled HCFCs or HFCs. Refrigerator importers must confirm the refrigerant identity, GWP status, charge documentation, and whether any product-specific HFC prohibition or permit/reporting requirement applies.
summary.zh: 加拿大通过《消耗臭氧层物质和卤代烃替代物法规》管控消耗臭氧层物质和HFC。强制义务来自该法规，包括对进口受控HCFC、HFC物质及含有此类物质产品的限制。电冰箱进口商须确认制冷剂种类、GWP状态、充注量文件，以及是否适用任何产品特定HFC禁令或许可/报告要求。
summary.zht: 加拿大通過《消耗臭氧層物質和鹵代烴替代物法規》管控消耗臭氧層物質和HFC。強制義務來自該法規，包括對進口受控HCFC、HFC物質及含有此類物質產品的限制。電冰箱進口商須確認製冷劑種類、GWP狀態、充注量文件，以及是否適用任何產品特定HFC禁令或許可/報告要求。

standards_or_laws: Ozone-depleting Substances and Halocarbon Alternatives Regulations (SOR/2016-137)
Canadian Environmental Protection Act, 1999 — enabling act
ODSHACR Part 3 — HCFCs; Part 4 — HFCs; product import controls where applicable

summary.en: Chinese export models commonly use R600a isobutane for household refrigerators, with refrigerant charge and flammability controls documented through GB 4706.13/IEC 60335-2-24 style safety files. Some legacy or specialty models may use HFCs. Chinese domestic acceptance does not determine Canadian ODSHACR import status.
summary.zh: 中国出口型家用电冰箱通常使用R600a异丁烷，并通过GB 4706.13/IEC 60335-2-24体系安全文件记录制冷剂充注量和可燃性控制。部分旧型号或特殊型号可能使用HFC。中国国内接受状态不能决定加拿大ODSHACR进口状态。
summary.zht: 中國出口型家用電冰箱通常使用R600a異丁烷，並通過GB 4706.13/IEC 60335-2-24體系安全文件記錄製冷劑充注量和可燃性控制。部分舊型號或特殊型號可能使用HFC。中國國內接受狀態不能決定加拿大ODSHACR進口狀態。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 safety documentation for refrigerating appliances
China refrigerant and dangerous-goods documentation used for export shipments
Product nameplate refrigerant identity and charge marking

gap.en: R600a generally avoids HFC phase-down issues but still requires safety, transport, nameplate, and charge documentation. Any HFC-containing model needs a Canadian ODSHACR review before shipment because product import restrictions can apply even if the appliance is otherwise energy and electrically compliant.
gap.zh: R600a通常可避免HFC削减问题，但仍需要安全、运输、铭牌和充注量文件。任何含HFC型号在出货前均需进行加拿大ODSHACR审查，因为即使器具在能效和电气方面合规，产品进口限制仍可能适用。
gap.zht: R600a通常可避免HFC削減問題，但仍需要安全、運輸、銘牌和充注量文件。任何含HFC型號在出貨前均需進行加拿大ODSHACR審查，因為即使器具在能效和電氣方面合規，產品進口限制仍可能適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory federal obligation under Ozone-depleting Substances and Halocarbon Alternatives Regulations (SOR/2016-137)
mandatory_status.cn: China safety and export documentation requirements apply; domestic GB safety compliance does not substitute for Canadian ODSHACR review

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Confirm refrigerant identity at BOM and nameplate level before Canadian shipment. R600a models are usually better positioned, while HFC models require specific Canadian import-restriction screening.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加拿大出货前应在BOM和铭牌层面确认制冷剂种类。R600a型号通常更有利，HFC型号则需进行具体的加拿大进口限制筛查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加拿大出貨前應在BOM和銘牌層面確認製冷劑種類。R600a型號通常更有利，HFC型號則需進行具體的加拿大進口限制篩查。

source.publisher: Department of Justice Canada / Environment and Climate Change Canada
